steps.title: Use the whereas contrast
steps.content: The underlined portion describes what most comparable manuscripts contained: celebrated medieval authors and elite readings. The word whereas then contrasts that norm with the Heege Manuscript's popular and practical emphasis.

steps.title: Reject reversed functions
steps.content: Choice A says the comparison is poor, but the text uses it to clarify the HM. Choice B focuses on how common such manuscripts were, not their content. Choice D reverses the purpose by making the HM explain the Findern Anthology. The answer is C.
